Variables.Name: IKBone
Variables.Description: Name of bone to control. This is the main bone chain to modify from.

Variables.Name: bAllowStretching
Variables.Description: Should stretching be allowed, to be prevent over extension

Variables.Name: StartStretchRatio
Variables.Description: Limits to use if stretching is allowed. This value determines when to start stretch. For example, 0.9 means once it reaches 90% of the whole length of the limb, it will start apply.

Variables.Name: MaxStretchScale
Variables.Description: Limits to use if stretching is allowed. This value determins what is the max stretch scale. For example, 1.5 means it will stretch until 150 % of the whole length of the limb.

Variables.Name: StretchLimits_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Limits to use if stretching is allowed - old property DEPRECATED

Variables.Name: bTakeRotationFromEffectorSpace
Variables.Description: Set end bone to use End Effector rotation

Variables.Name: bMaintainEffectorRelRot
Variables.Description: Keep local rotation of end bone

Variables.Name: EffectorSpaceBoneName_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: If EffectorLocationSpace is a bone, this is the bone to use.

Variables.Name: EffectorLocation
Variables.Description: Effector Location. Target Location to reach.

Variables.Name: JointTargetLocationSpace
Variables.Description: Reference frame of Joint Target Location.

Variables.Name: JointTargetLocation
Variables.Description: Joint Target Location. Location used to orient Joint bone.

Variables.Name: JointTargetSpaceBoneName_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: If JointTargetSpaceBoneName is a bone, this is the bone to use.

Variables.Name: bAllowTwist
Variables.Description: Whether or not to apply twist on the chain of joints. This clears the twist value along the TwistAxis

Variables.Name: TwistAxis
Variables.Description: Specify which axis it's aligned. Used when removing twist

Variables.Name: bNoTwist_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Whether or not to apply twist on the chain of joints. This clears the twist value along the TwistAxis
